{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Karoshan commander's spell
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan commander]] can cast a live binding spell that creates a bloody serpent of crimson light from his wand.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
